nodes.name: ðŸ“¦ Carry Context
nodes.notes: Passes tool, recipientEmail, and prompt through the parallel branch so Merge & Decide can access them.

values.content: You are a risk analysis expert. Analyze AI-generated business content and return risk assessment JSON only, no markdown, no backticks. You must respond with ONLY a valid JSON object.

Rewrite the following content to be safe, professional, clear, and free of any risky language. Maintain the original intent and tool type. Return only the improved content as JSON matching the original structure. No markdown, no backticks.

nodes.name: ðŸ“¦ Package Rewrite
nodes.notes: Merges Rewrite output with original context (tool, recipientEmail, risk data).

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, decision: $json.decision, risk_score: $json.risk_score, tool: $json.tool, result: $json.result || $json.generated, simulation: $json.simulation, risk_analysis: $json.risk_analysis, status: 'approved', emailSent: $json.tool === 'email', message: 'Content approved.' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, decision: $json.decision, risk_score: $json.risk_score, tool: $json.tool, result: $json.result || $json.generated, simulation: $json.simulation, risk_analysis: $json.risk_analysis, status: 'approved', emailSent: false, message: 'Content approved.' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, decision: 'MODIFY', risk_score: $json.risk_score, tool: $json.tool, original: $json.generated, result: $json.rewritten, issues: $json.risk_analysis?.issues, simulation: $json.simulation, risk_analysis: $json.risk_analysis, status: 'modified_sent', emailSent: true, message: 'Content was improved and email sent.' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, decision: 'MODIFY', risk_score: $json.risk_score, tool: $json.tool, original: $json.generated, result: $json.rewritten, issues: $json.risk_analysis?.issues, simulation: $json.simulation, risk_analysis: $json.risk_analysis, status: 'modified', emailSent: false, message: 'Content improved. Review before sending.' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, decision: 'BLOCK', risk_score: $json.risk_score, message: $json.message, issues: $json.issues, status: 'blocked', emailSent: false }) }}
